creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:51:57 2014
New Revision: 353432
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353432
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353432/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, add BUILD_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189344
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/graphics/p5-GD-Arrow/Makefile

Modified: head/graphics/p5-GD-Arrow/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/p5-GD-Arrow/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:51:53 2014	(r353431)
+++ head/graphics/p5-GD-Arrow/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:51:57 2014	(r353432)
@@ -8,10 +8,14 @@ CATEGORIES=	graphics perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Draw arrows using GD
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-GD>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-GD
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-GD>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-GD
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
